programme.title: Christmas In The Highlands
programme.desc: (G) A New York sales manager is sent to the remote Scottish Highlands at Christmas to acquire a limited edition perfume from a dashing Earl preparing for his annual ball.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: (M) Follow the dramatic rise of young singer Britney Spears from humble beginnings to global stardom, facing challenges and a comeback that captures the world's attention.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: (M) A man agrees to take a job as the "live-in" manservant to a wealthy businesswoman. He then realizes he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Living With My Mother'S Killer
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
